symbols.name: LIGHTS05

provenance.reference_role: Aqua Map support-page witnesses guide generated-owned redraw; source images are not canonical art

symbols.required_change: Redraw LIGHTS05 from the Aqua Map visual witness as the same chart symbol, preserving the recognized silhouette, small-scale proportions, color cue, and any text/mark convention for 'LIGHTS05'.

semantic_brief.brief: LIGHTS05 is LIGHTS05. It is used as a light characteristic or lighted aid-to-navigation symbol. Required geometry: light symbol with the correct color cue and no invented hazard silhouette. Required colours: reference-defined.
semantic_brief.required_shape: light symbol with the correct color cue and no invented hazard silhouette
safety_invariants: Preserve the S-57/S-52 symbol class; do not substitute a different buoy/beacon/topmark/hazard family.
Preserve load-bearing colours and colour order.
Preserve topmark count/orientation and band pattern when present.
Use provider images as semantic/shape witnesses; Helm output remains generated-owned artwork.
semantic_brief.use_case: light characteristic or lighted aid-to-navigation symbol
